message: On page 27 Annual Report 2022 of PVT, under “Shareholder Structure”, the Annual Report does not disclose managerial or insider ownership. Therefore, ownership.managerial_inside_own is not available and treated as missing.

On page 35 Annual Report 2023 of PVT, under “Shareholder Structure”, the Annual Report does not disclose managerial or insider ownership. Therefore, ownership.managerial_inside_own is not available and treated as missing.
